name: Binus School Bekasi

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Saraswati No.1, Vida Bumiwedari, Bekasi, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say BINUS School Bekasi is the go-to option for families in the Bekasi area who want Cambridge qualifications at reasonable fees.
paragraphs: Parents say BINUS School Bekasi is the go-to option for families in the Bekasi area who want Cambridge qualifications at reasonable fees.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$15K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Technology labs.

metaDescription: Binus School Bekasi (Greater Jakarta). Parents say BINUS School Bekasi is the go-to option for families in the Bekasi area who want Cambridge qualifications at reasonable fees.…
